rows.desc_en: For this battle, your Arcane Missiles apply 1 Burn on hit. Remove this card.
rows.desc_zh: 本局对战中，你的奥弹施加1层燃烧。移除此牌。

rows.desc_en: For this battle, your Arcane Missiles have 25% chance to apply Freeze. Remove this card.
rows.desc_zh: 本局对战中，你的奥弹有25%概率施加冻结。移除此牌。

rows.desc_en: For this battle, your Arcane Missiles gain Bounce +1. Remove this card.
rows.desc_zh: 本局对战中，你的奥弹弹射+1。移除此牌。

rows.desc_en: For this battle, your Arcane Missiles gain Pierce +1. Remove this card.
rows.desc_zh: 本局对战中，你的奥弹穿透+1。移除此牌。

rows.desc_en: For this battle, your Arcane Missiles gain Damage +1. Remove this card.
rows.desc_zh: 本局对战中，你的奥弹伤害+1。移除此牌。

rows.desc_en: Shuffle 5 Arcane Evolution derivatives into your hand. Replace this card with Arcane Firework.
rows.desc_zh: 将5种奥术进化洗入你的手牌。用奥术礼花替换此牌。

rows.desc_en: Shuffle 5 Arcane Evolution derivatives into your hand. Flip 2 of them face-up. Replace this card with Arcane Firework.
rows.desc_zh: 将5种奥术进化洗入你的手牌。将2张奥术进化翻为正面。用奥术礼花替换此牌。

rows.desc_en: Shuffle 5 Arcane Evolution derivatives into your hand. Flip all of them face-up. Replace this card with Arcane Firework.
rows.desc_zh: 将5种奥术进化洗入你的手牌。将它们翻为正面。用奥术礼花替换此牌。

rows.desc_en: Shuffle in 2 Arcane Missiles.
rows.desc_zh: 洗入2张奥弹。

rows.desc_en: Shuffle in 2 Arcane Missiles. 50% chance to add 1 more.
rows.desc_zh: 洗入2张奥弹。有50%概率额外洗入1张。

rows.desc_en: Shuffle in 3 Arcane Missiles. 50% chance to add 1 more.
rows.desc_zh: 洗入3张奥弹。有50%概率额外洗入1张。

rows.desc_en: Entity+3. Your Arcane Missiles prioritize this unit and empower it. At turn end, fires a massive laser.
rows.desc_zh: 实体化+3。你的奥弹优先以本单位为目标并强化本单位。回合结束时，发射巨型激光。

rows.desc_en: Entity+3. Your Arcane Missiles prioritize this unit and empower it. At turn end, fires a massive supercharged laser.
rows.desc_zh: 实体化+3。你的奥弹优先以本单位为目标并强化本单位。回合结束时，发射巨型强力激光。

rows.desc_en: Fires a tracking projectile. Auto-fires when face-up at no mana cost.
rows.desc_zh: 发射一枚追踪弹。正面时立即自动触发，不消耗法力值。

rows.desc_en: Shuffle in 1 Arcane Missiles. Arcane Missiles in hand gain +1 damage.
rows.desc_zh: 洗入1张奥弹。你手牌中的奥弹伤害+1。

rows.desc_en: Shuffle in 2 Arcane Missiles. Arcane Missiles in hand gain +1 damage.
rows.desc_zh: 洗入2张奥弹。你手牌中的奥弹伤害+1。

rows.desc_en: Shuffle in 3 Arcane Missiles. Arcane Missiles in hand gain +1 damage.
rows.desc_zh: 洗入3张奥弹。你手牌中的奥弹伤害+1。

rows.desc_en: Damage+1, Entity+2. Each turn dodges the nearest enemy and fires 1 arrow at them.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+1，实体化+2。每回合躲避最近的敌人，并向其发射1枚弓箭。

rows.desc_en: Damage+3, Entity+2. Each turn dodges the nearest enemy and fires 1 arrow at them.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+3，实体化+2。每回合躲避最近的敌人，并向其发射1枚弓箭。

rows.desc_en: Damage+5, Entity+2. Each turn dodges the nearest enemy and fires 1 arrow at them.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+5，实体化+2。每回合躲避最近的敌人，并向其发射1枚弓箭。

rows.desc_en: Damage+5, Entity+2. Each turn dodges the nearest enemy and fires 1 arrow at them. The arrow pierces all enemies.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+5，实体化+2。每回合躲避最近的敌人，并向其发射1枚弓箭。该弓箭会穿透所有敌人。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+1. On pierce, deal a 120° cone in a random direction.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+1。穿透时向随机方向造成120°的范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+1. On pierce, deal a 180° cone in a random direction.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+1。穿透时向随机方向造成180°的范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: Bullets+2, Entity+2.
rows.desc_zh: 数量+2，实体化+2。

rows.desc_en: Bullets+3, Entity+2.
rows.desc_zh: 数量+3，实体化+2。

rows.desc_en: Bullets+4, Entity+2.
rows.desc_zh: 数量+4，实体化+2。

rows.desc_en: Detonate all Burn. Reveal: if 10 enemies are burning, immediately use for free.
rows.desc_zh: 触发所有燃烧效果。展露：如果有10个敌人处于燃烧状态，立刻免费使用。

rows.desc_en: Summon 2 Skeletons. Reveal: on skeleton death, deal a small AOE.
rows.desc_zh: 召唤2个骷髅。展露：骷髅死亡时，造成小范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: Summon 2 Skeletons. Reveal: on skeleton death, deal an AOE.
rows.desc_zh: 召唤2个骷髅。展露：骷髅死亡时，造成范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: Summon 3 Skeletons. Reveal: skeletons +1 damage; on death, deal a large AOE.
rows.desc_zh: 召唤3个骷髅。展露：骷髅伤害+1；骷髅死亡时，造成大范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: Damage+1.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+1。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+5, Bounce-10. Slower, much larger.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+5，弹射-10。速度降低，体积大幅增加。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+6, Bounce-10. Much larger.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+6，弹射-10。体积大幅增加。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+8, Bounce-10. Much larger.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+8，弹射-10。体积大幅增加。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+10. Much larger.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+10。体积大幅增加。

rows.desc_en: Summon 2 Skeletons. Discard same-name cards 3 more times to summon a mighty Undead Dragon!
rows.desc_zh: 召唤2个骷髅。弃置同名卡牌3次以召唤强大的亡灵龙！

rows.desc_en: Summon 2 Skeletons. Discard same-name cards 2 more times to summon a mighty Undead Dragon!
rows.desc_zh: 召唤2个骷髅。弃置同名卡牌2次以召唤强大的亡灵龙！

rows.desc_en: Temporary. Discover 2 bronze-tier Entity cards and apply all their effects.
rows.desc_zh: 临时。发现并获得2张铜等级的实体化卡牌的效果。

rows.desc_en: Temporary. Discover 2 silver-tier Entity cards and apply all their effects.
rows.desc_zh: 临时。发现并获得2张银等级的实体化卡牌的效果。

rows.desc_en: Temporary. Discover 2 gold-tier Entity cards and apply all their effects.
rows.desc_zh: 临时。发现并获得2张金等级的实体化卡牌的效果。

rows.desc_en: For the rest of this stage, each turn shuffle 2 Arcane Missiles into your hand. Replace this card with Arcane Firework.
rows.desc_zh: 在本关卡中，每回合开始时洗入2张奥弹。用奥术礼花替换此牌。

rows.desc_en: For the rest of this stage, each turn shuffle 2 Arcane Missiles into your hand, each with 1 random buff. Replace this card with Arcane Firework.
rows.desc_zh: 在本关卡中，每回合开始时洗入2张奥弹，它们具有1种随机强化。用奥术礼花替换此牌。

rows.desc_en: For the rest of this stage, each turn shuffle 2 Arcane Missiles into your hand, each with 2 random buffs. Replace this card with Arcane Firework.
rows.desc_zh: 在本关卡中，每回合开始时洗入2张奥弹，它们具有2种随机强化。用奥术礼花替换此牌。

rows.desc_en: Reveal: Damage +1. At end of turn, shuffle this card from the discard pile into your hand.
rows.desc_zh: 展露：伤害+1。回合结束时，将此牌从弃牌堆洗入你的手牌。

rows.desc_en: Reveal: Damage +2. At end of turn, shuffle this card from the discard pile into your hand.
rows.desc_zh: 展露：伤害+2。回合结束时，将此牌从弃牌堆洗入你的手牌。

rows.desc_en: Reveal: Damage +2. At end of turn, shuffle this card from the discard pile into your hand face-up.
rows.desc_zh: 展露：伤害+2。回合结束时，将此牌从弃牌堆洗入你的手牌，并将其翻为正面。

rows.desc_en: Reveal: Damage +2. At end of turn, shuffle this card from the discard pile into your hand. Each time you use a card, 25% chance to shuffle this from the discard pile into your hand.
rows.desc_zh: 展露：伤害+2。回合结束时，将此牌从弃牌堆洗入你的手牌。每次使用卡牌，都有25%的概率将此牌从弃牌堆洗入你的手牌。

rows.desc_en: Summon 1 Skeleton(s). Discard = use.
rows.desc_zh: 召唤1个骷髅。弃置此牌等同于使用。

rows.desc_en: Summon 1 Skeleton(s) with Damage+1. Discard = use.
rows.desc_zh: 召唤1个骷髅，他们的伤害+1。弃置此牌等同于使用。

rows.desc_en: Summon 2 Skeleton(s). Discard = use.
rows.desc_zh: 召唤2个骷髅。弃置此牌等同于使用。

rows.desc_en: Summon 2 Skeleton(s) with Damage+1. Discard = use.
rows.desc_zh: 召唤2个骷髅，他们的伤害+1。弃置此牌等同于使用。

rows.desc_en: Replace this card with Order Arrow. At the start of each turn, shuffle a temporary Conscription Order into your hand.
rows.desc_zh: 用令箭替换此牌。在你的回合开始时，将一张临时征召令洗入你的手牌。

rows.desc_en: Replace this card with Order Arrow. At the start of each turn, shuffle a temporary Conscription Order into your hand.
rows.desc_zh: 用令箭替换此牌。在你的回合开始时，将一张临时征召令洗入你的手牌。

rows.desc_en: Replace this card with Order Arrow. At the start of each turn, shuffle a temporary Conscription Order into your hand.
rows.desc_zh: 用令箭替换此牌。在你的回合开始时，将一张临时征召令洗入你的手牌。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. When discarded, discover 1 temporary 3-cost card (cost set to 2) and shuffle it into your hand face-up.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2。当你弃置此牌时，发现1张临时的3费卡牌，其消耗值为2；将其洗入手牌并翻为正面。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. When discarded, discover 1 temporary 3-cost card (cost 2) and shuffle it to the leftmost slot.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2。当你弃置此牌时，发现1张临时的3费卡牌，其消耗值为2；将其洗入最左侧。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. When discarded, discover 1 temporary 3-cost card (cost 1) and shuffle it to the leftmost slot.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2。当你弃置此牌时，发现1张临时的3费卡牌，其消耗值为1；将其洗入最左侧。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. When discarded, discover 1 temporary 3-cost card (cost 0) and shuffle it to the leftmost slot.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2。当你弃置此牌时，发现1张临时的3费卡牌，其消耗值为0；将其洗入最左侧。

rows.desc_en: Damage+1, Wave+1.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+1，波次+1。

rows.desc_en: Damage+1. Reveal: Wave+1.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+1。展露：波次+1。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+3. While piercing, consumes Pierce charges rapidly and deals damage.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+3。穿透时会快速消耗穿透次数并造成伤害。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+5. While piercing, consumes Pierce charges rapidly and deals damage.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+5。穿透时会快速消耗穿透次数并造成伤害。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+5. While piercing, consumes Pierce charges rapidly and deals damage.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+5。穿透时会快速消耗穿透次数并造成伤害。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+8. While piercing, consumes Pierce charges rapidly and deals damage.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+8。穿透时会快速消耗穿透次数并造成伤害。

rows.desc_en: Damage+4. When discarded, discover 1 temporary card. Shuffle it into your hand face-up, cost reduced by 1.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+4。弃置此牌时，发现1张临时的卡牌，将其洗入手牌并翻为正面，其消耗值-1。

rows.desc_en: Damage+5. When discarded, discover 1 temporary Reveal card. Shuffle it into your hand face-up, cost becomes 0.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+5。弃置此牌时，发现1张临时的展露卡牌，将其洗入手牌并翻为正面，其消耗值为0。

rows.desc_en: Damage+6. When discarded, discover 1 temporary Reveal card. Shuffle it into your hand face-up, cost becomes 0.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+6。弃置此牌时，发现1张临时的展露卡牌，将其洗入手牌并翻为正面，其消耗值为0。

rows.desc_en: Discover 1 temporary Skeleton card and shuffle it into your hand; auto-discards at end of your turn.
rows.desc_zh: 发现1张临时的骷髅卡牌并洗入你的手牌，它会在你回合结束时自动弃置。

rows.desc_en: Slower bullet, longer lifetime, continuously pulls enemies in.
rows.desc_zh: 速度降低，持续时间增加，并持续吸引敌人。

rows.desc_en: Slower bullet, longer lifetime, continuously pulls enemies in over a larger area.
rows.desc_zh: 速度降低，持续时间增加，并在更大范围持续吸引敌人。

rows.desc_en: Slower bullet, much longer lifetime, continuously pulls enemies in over a larger area.
rows.desc_zh: 速度降低，持续时间大量增加，并在更大范围持续吸引敌人。

rows.desc_en: Damage+4. If this shot ends your mana at exactly 0, Bounce+2, Pierce+1.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+4。如果本次射击正好用光你的法力值，弹射+2，穿透+1。

rows.desc_en: Damage+6. If this shot ends your mana at exactly 0, Bounce+3, Pierce+2.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+6。如果本次射击正好用光你的法力值，弹射+3，穿透+2。

rows.desc_en: Damage+8. If this shot ends your mana at exactly 0, Bounce+4, Pierce+3.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+8。如果本次射击正好用光你的法力值，弹射+4，穿透+3。

rows.desc_en: Damage+8. If this shot ends your mana at exactly 0, Bounce+4, Pierce+3. Otherwise, the next use of this card costs 1 less.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+8。如果本次射击正好用光你的法力值，弹射+4，穿透+3。否则，下1次使用此牌的费用-1。

rows.desc_en: On destruction, applies 1 Burn to enemies in range.
rows.desc_zh: 摧毁时对范围内的敌人施加1层燃烧。

rows.desc_en: On destruction, applies 1 Burn to enemies in a larger area.
rows.desc_zh: 摧毁时对更大范围内的敌人施加1层燃烧。

rows.desc_en: On destruction, applies 1 Burn to enemies in a huge area.
rows.desc_zh: 摧毁时对巨大范围内的敌人施加1层燃烧。

rows.desc_zh: 伤害+1，数量+1。

rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2，数量+1。

rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2，数量+2。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2, Bullets+3.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2，数量+3。

rows.desc_en: Flip 1 face-down hand card up. If its cost is 1, repeat.
rows.desc_zh: 将1张手牌翻为正面。如果它的消耗值为1，重复此行动。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+1, Bounce+2. Piercing a burning enemy deals small AOE.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+1，弹射+2。穿透燃烧敌人时造成小范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+1, Bounce+3. Piercing a burning enemy deals AOE.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+1，弹射+3。穿透燃烧敌人时造成范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+2, Bounce+3. Piercing a burning enemy deals AOE.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+2，弹射+3。穿透燃烧敌人时造成范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+2, Bounce+3. Piercing a burning enemy deals AOE; non-burning enemies get Ignited.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+2，弹射+3。穿透燃烧敌人时造成范围伤害并造成燃烧，否则点燃敌人。

rows.desc_en: Entity+2. Each turn applies 1 Burn to nearby enemies.
rows.desc_zh: 实体化+2。每回合向周围敌人施加1层燃烧。

rows.desc_en: Entity+3. Each turn applies 1 Burn to nearby enemies.
rows.desc_zh: 实体化+3。每回合向周围敌人施加1层燃烧。

rows.desc_en: Entity+3. Each turn applies 2 Burn to nearby enemies.

rows.desc_en: Bullets+1. Reveal: Bullets+2.
rows.desc_zh: 数量+1。展露：数量+2。

rows.desc_zh: 实体化+1，体积增加。

rows.desc_en: Entity+1, greatly increased size.
rows.desc_zh: 实体化+1，体积大幅增加。

rows.desc_zh: 伤害+1，实体化+1，体积大幅增加。实体化层数不会在回合结束时消退。

rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2，实体化+1，体积大幅增加。实体化层数不会在回合结束时消退。

rows.desc_zh: 命中时施加2层燃烧。

rows.desc_en: Bounce+1. On hit, apply 2 Burn.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+1，命中时施加2层燃烧。

rows.desc_en: Bounce+2. On hit, apply 2 Burn.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+2，命中时施加2层燃烧。

rows.desc_en: Bounce+2. Pierce+1. On hit, apply 3 Burn.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+2，穿透+1，命中时施加3层燃烧。

rows.desc_en: Damage+10, Pierce-5, Bounce-5.
Damage+9, Pierce-5, Bounce-5.

Damage+13, Pierce-5, Bounce-5.
On destruction, applies 1 Burn to a random enemy 3 times.

rows.desc_en: On destruction, applies 1 Burn to a random enemy 5 times.
rows.desc_zh: 摧毁时对随机敌人施加1燃烧，重复5次。

rows.desc_en: Entity+3, greatly reduced speed. Each turn attacks the nearest enemy. When you discard, summon 2 Skeletons.

rows.desc_zh: 穿透+1。穿透时，1个随机友方实体化单位获得实体化+1。

rows.desc_zh: 穿透+2。穿透时，1个随机友方实体化单位获得实体化+1。

rows.desc_zh: 穿透+3。穿透时，1个随机友方实体化单位获得实体化+1。

rows.desc_zh: 数量+2，弹射+2。无法瞄准。

rows.desc_en: Bullets+2, Bounce+4. Cannot aim.
rows.desc_zh: 数量+2，弹射+4。无法瞄准。

rows.desc_en: Bullets+3, Bounce+4. Cannot aim.
rows.desc_zh: 数量+3，弹射+4。无法瞄准。

rows.desc_en: Bullets+4, Bounce+4. Cannot aim.
rows.desc_zh: 数量+4，弹射+4。无法瞄准。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+2. Speeds up on pierce.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+2。穿透时，速度小幅提高。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+2. Speeds up on pierce.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+2。穿透时，速度提高。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+2, Bounce+1. Speeds up on pierce.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+2，弹射+1。穿透时，速度提高。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+2, Bounce+1. Speeds up on pierce or bounce.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+2，弹射+1。穿透和弹射时，速度提高。

rows.desc_en: Bullets ×4, but each bullet has 50% chance to deal 0 damage.
rows.desc_zh: 数量*4，但有50%概率伤害值变为0。

rows.desc_en: Bullets ×4, but each bullet has 30% chance to deal 0 damage.
rows.desc_zh: 数量*4，但有30%概率伤害值变为0。

rows.desc_en: Damage +2. When discarded, shuffle 2 cards from the discard pile into your hand.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2。被弃置时，将2张弃牌堆中的牌洗入手牌。

rows.desc_en: Damage +2. When discarded, shuffle 2 cards from the discard pile into your hand face-up.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2。被弃置时，将2张弃牌堆中的牌洗入手牌，并将它们翻为正面。

rows.desc_en: For the rest of this stage, each enemy death has a 20% chance to summon a Skeleton. Replace this card with Crypt.
rows.desc_zh: 在本关卡中，每个敌人死亡时，有20%的概率召唤1个骷髅。用墓穴替换此牌。

rows.desc_en: Damage+1. Gain 1 Chain stack.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+1，获得1层连携。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. Gain 1 Chain stack.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2，获得1层连携。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. Gain 1 Chain stack, plus 50% chance to gain 1 more.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2，获得1层连携，50%的概率额外获得1层。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. Gain 2 Chain stacks.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2，获得2层连携。

rows.desc_en: Bullets+2. Damage falls off with distance.
rows.desc_zh: 数量+2。伤害随距离减少。

rows.desc_en: Bullets+3. Damage falls off with distance.
rows.desc_zh: 数量+3。伤害随距离减少。

rows.desc_en: Bullets+4. Damage falls off with distance.
rows.desc_zh: 数量+4。伤害随距离减少。

rows.desc_en: Bullets+5. Damage falls off with distance.
rows.desc_zh: 数量+5。伤害随距离减少。

rows.desc_en: Bounce+3, Pierce+3. Counts convert into each other.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+3，穿透+3。弹射和穿透次数可互相转化。

rows.desc_en: Bounce+4, Pierce+4. Counts convert into each other.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+4，穿透+4。弹射和穿透次数可互相转化。

rows.desc_en: On collision, deals a 120° AOE blast in a random direction.
rows.desc_zh: 碰撞时向随机方向造成120°的范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: On collision, deals a 180° AOE blast in a random direction.
rows.desc_zh: 碰撞时向随机方向造成180°的范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: Bounce+1. On bounce or collision, deals a 180° AOE blast in a random direction.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+1。弹射和碰撞时向随机方向造成180°的范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: Summon 2 skeleton(s). Skeletons on the field gain +1 damage. Discard = use.
rows.desc_zh: 召唤2个骷髅，使你场上的骷髅获得+1伤害。弃置此牌等同于使用。

rows.desc_en: Summon 3 skeleton(s). Skeletons on the field gain +1 damage. Discard = use.
rows.desc_zh: 召唤3个骷髅，使你场上的骷髅获得+1伤害。弃置此牌等同于使用。

rows.desc_en: Summon 4 skeleton(s). Skeletons on the field gain +1 damage. Discard = use.
rows.desc_zh: 召唤4个骷髅，使你场上的骷髅获得+1伤害。弃置此牌等同于使用。

rows.desc_en: Entity+4. While alive, each dead skeleton grants +1 damage. Each turn attacks the nearest enemy; on kill, summons 1 skeleton.
rows.desc_zh: 实体化+4。在场时，每个死亡的骷髅会为此单位提供+1伤害。每回合攻击最近的敌人，如果击杀则召唤1个骷髅。

rows.desc_en: Entity+3. While alive, each dead skeleton grants +1 damage. Each turn attacks the nearest enemy 2 times; on kill, summons 1 skeleton.
rows.desc_zh: 实体化+3。在场时，每个死亡的骷髅会为此单位提供+1伤害。每回合攻击最近的敌人2次，如果击杀则召唤1个骷髅。

rows.desc_en: Damage+3. Your next 2 shots gain Damage+1.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+3。你的后2次射击获得伤害+1。

rows.desc_en: Damage+3. Your next 2 shots gain Damage+2.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+3。你的后2次射击获得伤害+2。

rows.desc_en: Damage+3. Your next 3 shots gain Damage+2.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+3。你的后3次射击获得伤害+2。

rows.desc_en: Damage+3. Your next 3 shots gain Damage+3.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+3。你的后3次射击获得伤害+3。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. Damage scales slightly with distance.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2。伤害会随着经过距离增加而略微增加。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. Damage scales lightly with distance.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2。伤害会随着经过距离增加而轻度增加。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. Damage scales with distance.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2。伤害会随着经过距离增加而增加。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. Damage scales rapidly with distance.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2。伤害会随着经过距离增加而快速增加。

rows.desc_en: Summon 2 Skeletons. Discard 2 random hand cards.
rows.desc_zh: 召唤2个骷髅。随机弃置2张手牌。

rows.desc_en: Summon 2 Skeletons. Discard 2 random hand cards; each with the Skeleton keyword summons 1 more Skeleton.
rows.desc_zh: 召唤2个骷髅。随机弃置2张手牌，每张包含骷髅关键词的牌会额外召唤1个骷髅。

rows.desc_en: Summon 2 Skeletons. Discard 2 random hand cards; each with the Skeleton keyword summons 1 more Skeleton, otherwise +1 damage to your skeletons.
rows.desc_zh: 召唤2个骷髅。随机弃置2张手牌，每张包含骷髅关键词的牌会额外召唤1个骷髅，反之使场上的骷髅伤害+1。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+2, slightly slower, tracks enemies.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+2，速度略微降低，可追踪敌人。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+4, slightly slower, tracks enemies.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+4，速度略微降低，可追踪敌人。

rows.desc_en: Pierce+5, Bounce+2, tracks enemies.
rows.desc_zh: 穿透+5，弹射+2，可追踪敌人。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. Reveal: at end of turn, summon Sword Saint.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2。展露：回合结束时召唤剑圣。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. Reveal: at end of turn, summon Awakened Sword Saint.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2。展露：回合结束时召唤觉醒剑圣。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2. This card is always face-up while in hand. Reveal: at end of turn, summon Awakened Sword Saint.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2。当此牌在手牌中，始终为正面。展露：回合结束时召唤觉醒剑圣。

rows.desc_en: Entity+2, larger volume. Each turn slashes the nearest enemy for a 90° AOE.
rows.desc_zh: 实体化+2，体积增大。每回合向最近的一名敌人挥剑，造成90°的范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: Damage+1, Entity+2, larger volume. Each turn slashes the nearest enemy for a 120° AOE.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+1，实体化+2，体积增大。每回合向最近的一名敌人挥剑，造成120°的范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: Damage+1, Entity+2, larger volume. Each turn slashes 180° AOE.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+1，实体化+2，体积增大。每回合向周围挥剑，造成180°的范围伤害。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2, Entity+3, larger volume. 360° slash with +50% reach. +1 damage per enemy hit.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2，实体化+3，体积增大。每回合向周围挥剑，造成360°的大范围伤害。每命中一个敌人，伤害+1。

rows.desc_en: Bounce +2. On bounce, 20% to flip a hand card face-up.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+2。弹射时20%将一张手牌翻为正面。

rows.desc_en: Bounce +3. On bounce, 30% to flip a hand card face-up.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+3。弹射时30%将一张手牌翻为正面。

rows.desc_en: Bounce +4. On bounce, 30% to flip a hand card face-up.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+4。弹射时30%将一张手牌翻为正面。

rows.desc_en: Bounce +4. On bounce, 50% to flip a hand card face-up; if all hand cards are already face-up, gain Damage +1 instead.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+4。弹射时50%将一张手牌翻为正面；如果所有手牌已经是正面，则自身伤害+1。

rows.desc_en: Entity+2. Each turn fires 2 tracking shots at the nearest enemy. On kill, heal player 1 HP.
rows.desc_zh: 实体化+2。每回合向最近的一名敌人发射攻击2次。击杀敌人后，为玩家恢复1血量。

rows.desc_en: Damage+2, Entity+2. Each turn fires 2 tracking shots at the nearest enemy. On kill, heal player 1 HP.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害+2，实体化+2。每回合向最近的一名敌人发射攻击2次。击杀敌人后，为玩家恢复1血量。

rows.desc_en: Damage-99. Entity+5. Greatly increased size.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害-99。实体化+5。体积大幅增加。

rows.desc_en: Damage-99. Entity+7. Greatly increased size.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害-99。实体化+7。体积大幅增加。

rows.desc_en: Damage-99. Entity+10. Greatly increased size.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害-99。实体化+10。体积大幅增加。

rows.desc_en: Damage-99. Entity+15. Greatly increased size.
rows.desc_zh: 伤害-99。实体化+15。体积大幅增加。

rows.desc_en: Your entities on the field gain +1 damage. Reveal: each summoned friendly entity gets +1 damage and +1 Entity layer.
rows.desc_zh: 你场上的实体+1伤害。展露：当一个友方实体生成时，使其+1伤害与+1实体化。

rows.desc_en: Your entities on the field gain +1 damage. Reveal: each summoned friendly entity gets +2 damage and +1 Entity layer.
rows.desc_zh: 你场上的实体+1伤害。展露：当一个友方实体生成时，使其+2伤害与+1实体化。

rows.desc_en: Your entities on the field gain +2 damage. Reveal: each summoned friendly entity gets +2 damage and +1 Entity layer.
rows.desc_zh: 你场上的实体+2伤害。展露：当一个友方实体生成时，使其+2伤害与+1实体化。

rows.desc_en: Your entities on the field gain +2 damage. Reveal: each summoned friendly entity gets +3 damage and +1 Entity layer.
rows.desc_zh: 你场上的实体+2伤害。展露：当一个友方实体生成时，使其+3伤害与+1实体化。

rows.desc_en: Bounce+2. On bounce, grants bonus damage equal to its own total damage to 1 random friendly Entity unit.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+2。弹射时，会将伤害加成至1个随机友方实体化单位。

rows.desc_en: Bounce+4. On bounce, grants bonus damage equal to its own total damage to 1 random friendly Entity unit.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+4。弹射时，会将伤害加成至1个随机友方实体化单位。

rows.desc_en: Bounce+4, Damage+2. On bounce, grants bonus damage equal to its own total damage to 1 random friendly Entity unit.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+4，伤害+2。弹射时，会将伤害加成至1个随机友方实体化单位。

rows.desc_en: Bounce+4, Damage+2. On bounce, grants bonus damage equal to its own total damage to 2 random friendly Entity units.
rows.desc_zh: 弹射+4，伤害+2。弹射时，会将伤害加成至2个随机友方实体化单位。
